signals.snippet: I’d like to cancel our service. How do I go about this?

signals.last_msg_before: Yes we can do it for you !

cause_analysis.narrative: The Collab Studio churned on 2026-04-06 after 202 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 33-day silence starting 2025-12-18. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 71 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

We really appreciate your patience with us, Kim!  We would like to confirm that we have closed the account and reversed the charges.

I am terribly sorry to hear about that, Kim!   This is not how we work, and we do not want any of our customers to experience this.   I will be escalating this on your behalf. I have already raised a refund, and the person in charge will be dealt with.   We truly apologise for the inconvenience caused.

I think I need to report your company for unethical practices. From your pressure sales to the headache process of trying to cancel your services. Why is it I have to request cancellation for weeks?? Someone needs to get back to me asap before I escalate this.
